raw_consumer_statement: Bought tickets to an event that was a scam. It was a safety hazard, started late, ticket line was 4-5 hrs long, and security line was another hour. The third party ticketing site said they will buyers guarantee but did not honor their policy since the event was not as described. I eventually got into the event at XXXX and the event ended at XXXX, but left early anyways due to overcrowding and security hazards.
